title: Empower Zambians to directly own shares in mining companies, Saasa urges govt – Zambia: News Diggers!
impact_evidence: Governance | Reputation & Social License | Mining image and public perception -> "it could send a wrong signal to foreign investors because their proposal might be perceived as expropriation." | "it will send some eyebrows rising on the part of investors, who are already doing so.
